name: BB:Threats: Scanning: ICMP Scan High
notes: This Building Block identifies a high level of ICMP reconnaissance.
bb_references: BB:Threats: Scanning: ICMP Scan High on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the IP protocol is one of the following ICMP
when the flow type is one of Superflow A, Superflow B, Superflow C
when the number of local hosts is greater than than 100000
TD_list: APPLY BB:Threats: Scanning: ICMP Scan High on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the IP protocol is one of the following ICMP
AND when the flow type is one of Superflow A, Superflow B, Superflow C
AND when the number of local hosts is greater than than 100000
